title: C# HTTP Client TypeSpec Emitter Rewrite
description: Rewrite the C# HTTP client code generator from a two-phase system (TypeScript emitter → JSON → C# Roslyn generator) to a single-phase TypeScript emitter using the Alloy JSX framework. The rewrite must produce identical C# output to the legacy generator.

phases.title: Project Foundation
phases.description: Set up the emitter entry point, System.ClientModel builtins, root output component, and testing infrastructure. This is the foundation that all subsequent phases build upon.

tasks.title: Define emitter options interface
tasks.description: Create the TypeScript interface for all emitter options. The legacy emitter defines options in `emitter/src/options.ts` including: package-name (string), license (object with name/company/link/header/description), disable-xml-docs (boolean), generate-protocol-methods (boolean), generate-convenience-methods (boolean), unreferenced-types-handling (enum: removeOrInternalize|internalize|keepAll), new-project (boolean), save-inputs (boolean). The rewrite options should match the legacy ones minus the C#-generator-specific options (debug, generator-name, emitter-extension-path). The options are registered with the TypeSpec library system via `createTypeSpecLibrary` in `lib.ts`.
acceptance_criteria: Includes package-name, license, disable-xml-docs, generate-protocol-methods, generate-convenience-methods, unreferenced-types-handling, new-project
License sub-interface with name, company, link, header, description fields
All options have appropriate TypeScript types

tasks.title: Register emitter options in library
tasks.description: Update src/lib.ts to register the emitter options schema with TypeSpec's library system. Use `createTypeSpecLibrary` with an `emitter` options schema that maps each option to its TypeSpec type (string, boolean, enum). Add default values. Reference the legacy emitter's lib.ts for the pattern. Also define diagnostic codes that the emitter will use (general-warning, general-error, unsupported-auth, unsupported-type, etc.).
acceptance_criteria: lib.ts exports $lib with emitter options schema
Default values match legacy emitter defaults
Diagnostic codes defined for common warning/error scenarios

tasks.title: Implement $onEmit entry point
tasks.description: Rewrite src/emitter.tsx to be the real emitter entry point. It should: (1) resolve emitter options from the EmitContext, (2) create a TCGC SdkContext via createSdkContext(), (3) render the root <HttpClientCSharpOutput> component tree, (4) call writeOutput() from @typespec/emitter-framework to write files to disk. The legacy emitter does this in emitter/src/emitter.ts but also serializes to JSON and spawns a C# process — skip those steps entirely. Use the Output component from @typespec/emitter-framework which sets up TspContext.
acceptance_criteria: $onEmit creates SdkContext and renders component tree
writeOutput() called with program, root component, and output directory
Emitter options properly resolved and passed to components
No JSON serialization or C# process spawning

tasks.title: Add required dependencies
tasks.description: Update package.json to add required dependencies: @typespec/http, @typespec/rest, @azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-core (TCGC), @alloy-js/csharp. Also add @typespec/http-client-csharp-testing or equivalent test utilities as devDependencies. Remove @alloy-js/typescript if unused. Run pnpm install to update lockfile.

tasks.title: Create System.ClientModel core builtins
tasks.description: Create an Alloy builtin library declaration for System.ClientModel using createLibrary() from @alloy-js/csharp. This enables generated code to reference SCM types (ClientResult, ClientPipeline, BinaryContent, etc.) with automatic using-statement generation. Declare types in the System.ClientModel and System.ClientModel.Primitives namespaces. Include: ClientResult, ClientResult<T>, ClientPipeline, BinaryContent, PipelineMessage, PipelineRequest, PipelineResponse, PipelinePolicy, PipelineMessageClassifier. Each type should be declared with its kind (class/struct/interface) and key members (properties and methods used in generated code). See the Alloy builtins pattern at alloy/packages/csharp/src/builtins/System/index.ts for the declaration pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Types can be referenced in JSX and produce correct using statements

tasks.title: Add SCM auth and options builtins
tasks.description: Extend the System.ClientModel builtins with auth and options types: ClientPipelineOptions, RequestOptions, ClientResultException, ApiKeyCredential, ApiKeyAuthenticationPolicy (with CreateHeaderApiKeyPolicy static method). These are used in generated client constructors and pipeline setup. See golden file at TestProjects/Local/Sample-TypeSpec/src/Generated/SampleTypeSpecClient.cs for how these types are used.
acceptance_criteria: ApiKeyAuthenticationPolicy with CreateHeaderApiKeyPolicy static method declared

tasks.title: Add SCM paging builtins
tasks.description: Add paging-related types to the System.ClientModel builtins: CollectionResult, AsyncCollectionResult, CollectionResult<T>, AsyncCollectionResult<T>, ContinuationToken. These are the base classes that generated paging collection classes extend. See golden file at TestProjects/Local/Sample-TypeSpec/src/Generated/CollectionResults/ for usage.
acceptance_criteria: CollectionResult and AsyncCollectionResult base classes declared
Generic variants CollectionResult<T> and AsyncCollectionResult<T> declared
ContinuationToken with FromBytes static method declared

tasks.title: Add SCM serialization builtins
tasks.description: Add model serialization types to the System.ClientModel builtins: ModelReaderWriterOptions, ModelReaderWriterContext, IJsonModel<T>, IPersistableModel<T>, ModelReaderWriter (with Write static method), PersistableModelProxyAttribute, ModelReaderWriterBuildableAttribute. These are the interfaces and attributes that generated serialization classes implement. See golden file at TestProjects/Local/Sample-TypeSpec/src/Generated/Models/ for any .Serialization.cs file.
acceptance_criteria: IJsonModel<T> interface declared with Write, Create methods
IPersistableModel<T> interface declared with Write, Create, GetFormatFromOptions
ModelReaderWriter with Write static method declared

tasks.title: Add SCM auth token builtins
tasks.description: Add token auth types: BearerTokenPolicy, UserAgentPolicy, AuthenticationTokenProvider. These are used in client pipeline construction. See ClientProvider.cs in the legacy generator for usage patterns.

tasks.title: Add SCM JsonPatch builtins
tasks.description: Add JsonPatch and related experimental types for merge-patch support. These are only needed when dynamic models are present. See MrwSerializationTypeDefinition.Dynamic.cs in the legacy generator.
acceptance_criteria: JsonPatch struct declared with Contains, IsRemoved, GetJson, Set, WriteTo, SetPropagators methods

tasks.title: Create root HttpClientCSharpOutput component
tasks.description: Create the root component that wraps the entire emitter output. It should use the Output component from @typespec/emitter-framework (which sets up TspContext) and configure the C# name policy (PascalCase for classes/methods/properties, camelCase for parameters/variables) via createCSharpNamePolicy() from @alloy-js/csharp. It should also set format options (4-space indent, 120 print width). The component iterates over the TCGC SdkPackage to produce: model files, enum files, client files, infrastructure files, and project files. Initially it can just render an empty <Output> with correct config.
acceptance_criteria: HttpClientCSharpOutput component renders Output with TspContext
C# name policy configured (PascalCase classes, camelCase parameters)
Format options set (4-space indent, 120 print width)

tasks.title: Create EmitterContext provider
tasks.description: Create an Alloy ComponentContext that carries the resolved emitter options and derived state through the component tree. Components throughout the emitter will use this context to access: the package name, license info, whether XML serialization is needed, whether dynamic models exist, whether multipart operations exist, the TCGC SdkPackage with all clients/models/enums. Use createContext() from @alloy-js/core to create the context, and provide it in the HttpClientCSharpOutput component.
acceptance_criteria: Context carries: options, packageName, license, sdkPackage, hasXml, hasDynamicModels, hasMultipart

tasks.title: Implement namespace resolution
tasks.description: Create a utility function that resolves the C# root namespace from the TCGC SdkPackage. The legacy emitter uses getClientNamespaceString() in utils.ts which: (1) checks the package-name option, (2) falls back to the service namespace, (3) converts kebab-case segments to PascalCase, (4) joins with dots. Implement the same logic. Also handle namespace conflict detection from the legacy InputNamespace.InvalidNamespaceSegments list.
acceptance_criteria: resolveNamespace() converts TCGC namespace to C# namespace string
Detects namespace conflicts with reserved words

tasks.title: Implement license header rendering
acceptance_criteria: getLicenseHeader(options) returns the standard C# file header string
Includes copyright line with company name
Includes license line with license name

tasks.title: Set up scenario test harness
tasks.description: Set up the @typespec/emitter-framework scenario test harness for end-to-end testing. Use createCSharpExtractorConfig() to configure tree-sitter for C# snippet extraction. Create a test entry point that calls executeScenarios() with the emitter tester configured to import @typespec/http and @typespec/rest. Create the test/scenarios/ directory for markdown scenario files.
acceptance_criteria: test/scenarios.test.ts sets up scenario test harness
vitest can discover and run the scenario tests

tasks.title: Create test utility functions
tasks.description: Create test helper utilities for unit testing individual components. Include: createTestHost() that sets up a TypeSpec test host with the emitter configured, compileAndEmit(code) that compiles TypeSpec code and returns the emitted output directory, assertFileContents(output, path, expected) for file content assertions. Follow the existing test pattern at test/test-host.ts and test/hello.test.ts.
acceptance_criteria: compileAndEmit() compiles TypeSpec and returns output

tasks.title: Write baseline test
tasks.description: Write the first scenario test verifying the emitter works end-to-end. Test that a minimal TypeSpec service (just `@service namespace MyService;`) emits the correct file structure. This validates the entire pipeline from $onEmit through Alloy rendering to file output.
acceptance_criteria: Test compiles a minimal TypeSpec service
Test verifies emitter produces output without errors

tasks.title: Configure test directory structure
tasks.description: Set up the test directory structure mirroring the Spector test organization. Create subdirectories under test/scenarios/ for: models, enums, clients, serialization, parameters, paging, authentication, versioning. This provides organized locations for scenario tests as features are implemented.

phases.title: Type System — Models and Enums
phases.description: Generate C# model classes, enum types, and their serialization companions from TCGC types.

tasks.title: Verify TypeExpression coverage
tasks.description: Audit the emitter-framework's TypeExpression component to verify it covers all TCGC SdkType kinds needed for the HTTP client. Check: primitives (bool, int, string, etc.), datetime (utcDateTime→DateTimeOffset, offsetDateTime→DateTimeOffset), duration→TimeSpan, bytes→byte[], models (reference by refkey), enums (reference by refkey), arrays→T[] or IList<T>, dicts→IDictionary<string,T>, unions→BinaryData, nullable→T?. Document any gaps.
acceptance_criteria: Document listing all type mappings and gaps
Utility functions for any missing mappings

tasks.title: Add missing type mappings
tasks.description: Implement any type mappings missing from the emitter-framework's TypeExpression. Known needed additions: InputPrimitiveType.Url→System.Uri, Stream→System.IO.Stream, IPAddress→System.Net.IPAddress. Create a wrapper component or utility that extends TypeExpression with these additional mappings. Use the Alloy System builtins for Uri, Stream, etc.
acceptance_criteria: All TCGC types map to correct C# types
Component falls through to emitter-framework TypeExpression for standard types

tasks.title: Create collection type utilities
tasks.description: Create utility functions that determine the correct C# collection type based on usage direction. Input models use IList<T>/IDictionary<string,T> (mutable). Output models use IReadOnlyList<T>/IReadOnlyDictionary<string,T> (immutable). The PropertyInitializationType maps IList→List, IDictionary→Dictionary for constructor initialization. See TypeFactory.CreateCSharpType in the legacy generator for the array/dict handling.
acceptance_criteria: getInitializationType() returns List<T> or Dictionary<K,V> for constructor init

tasks.title: Create nullable type utilities
tasks.description: Create utility functions for nullable type handling. Rules: optional non-collection value types become T? (Nullable<T>). Optional reference types stay as-is (already nullable in C# with #nullable disable). Required types are never nullable. Collections are never nullable (use ChangeTrackingList for 'undefined' semantics instead). See PropertyProvider.cs lines 86-100 in the legacy generator.
acceptance_criteria: Handles value types, reference types, collections, enums

tasks.title: Write type mapping tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests for all type mapping utilities. Test every TypeSpec scalar → C# type mapping, collection type selection based on usage direction, and nullable type determination. Include edge cases: nested collections, nullable enums, literal types.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover all primitive type mappings

tasks.title: Create ModelFile component
tasks.description: Create the ModelFile component that generates a complete model .cs file. It should produce a SourceFile with the standard header (copyright, auto-generated, #nullable disable), using statements (auto-managed by Alloy), file-scoped namespace, and a partial class declaration. Use @alloy-js/csharp SourceFile and ClassDeclaration components. The file path should be src/Generated/Models/{ModelName}.cs. See any model golden file like TestProjects/Local/Sample-TypeSpec/src/Generated/Models/Thing.cs for the exact format.
acceptance_criteria: ModelFile generates a .cs file with correct path

tasks.title: Implement model property generation
tasks.description: Implement property generation inside the model class. Properties should have: XML doc comment from TypeSpec @doc, correct C# type from TypeExpression, access modifier (public), getter (always), setter (only for input+output models — see PropertyProvider.PropertyHasSetter logic). Read-only properties use get-only. Optional properties of value types use nullable T?. Property names follow PascalCase convention. See PropertyProvider.cs for the complete setter determination logic.
acceptance_criteria: Properties render with correct types and accessors

tasks.title: Implement required vs optional property logic
tasks.description: Implement the full required/optional property logic. Required non-nullable reference types get Argument.AssertNotNull in constructors. Optional collections are initialized to ChangeTrackingList<T> or ChangeTrackingDictionary<string,T>. Required collections use .ToList() from IEnumerable parameter. Optional scalars get default values. See ModelProvider.GetPropertyInitializers and the constructor building logic.
acceptance_criteria: Required reference types validated with Argument.AssertNotNull
Optional collections initialized to ChangeTracking types
Default values set correctly for optional properties

tasks.title: Implement public model constructor
tasks.description: Generate the public initialization constructor. Parameters include only required, non-readonly, non-literal properties. Each parameter has Argument.AssertNotNull validation for non-nullable reference types. Constructor body assigns parameters to properties. For abstract models, constructor is private protected. For output-only models, constructor is internal. See ModelProvider.BuildConstructors and ConstructorProviderHelper.
acceptance_criteria: Public constructor with required params generated

tasks.title: Implement internal serialization constructor
tasks.description: Generate the internal serialization constructor that takes ALL properties plus the additionalBinaryDataProperties dictionary. This constructor is used by deserialization code. It has no validation — just direct assignment. Parameters follow the same order as properties plus raw data last. See ModelProvider.FullConstructor.
acceptance_criteria: Internal constructor with all params generated

tasks.title: Implement additionalBinaryDataProperties field
tasks.description: Generate the _additionalBinaryDataProperties field on models. It's declared as `private protected readonly IDictionary<string, BinaryData> _additionalBinaryDataProperties`. Only generated on the root model in an inheritance hierarchy (not on derived models). Used to store unknown JSON properties during deserialization. See ModelProvider.RawDataField.
acceptance_criteria: Field generated on root models only

tasks.title: Implement model XML doc comments
tasks.description: Generate XML documentation comments on models and their members. Use the @alloy-js/csharp DocComment and DocSummary components. Extract documentation from TypeSpec's @doc decorator via useTsp(). Model gets a <summary> from the model's doc. Each property gets <summary> from its doc. Constructor parameters get <param> tags.

tasks.title: Handle model-as-struct
tasks.description: When a model has modelAsStruct=true, generate a readonly struct instead of a class. Use @alloy-js/csharp StructDeclaration with readonly modifier. Struct models always include all properties in the public constructor. See ModelProvider lines 206-211.
acceptance_criteria: ModelAsStruct models generate readonly partial struct
All properties included in public constructor

tasks.title: Write model generation tests
tasks.description: Write tests for model generation covering: simple model with required string property, model with optional properties, input-only model (no public ctor, read-only props), output-only model, input+output model (get/set props, both operators). Compare output against golden files from Spector http/type/model/usage/.

tasks.title: Implement abstract base model
tasks.description: When a model has a DiscriminatorProperty but no DiscriminatorValue, generate it as an abstract partial class with a private protected constructor. The discriminator property should be internal with get/set. See ModelProvider.IsAbstract logic and golden files at Spector/http/type/model/inheritance/single-discriminator/.
acceptance_criteria: Abstract models generate abstract partial class

tasks.title: Implement discriminator property
tasks.description: Generate the internal discriminator property on base models. For string discriminators, type is string. For enum discriminators, type is the enum type. The property is internal with get/set. See ModelProvider and the golden files.
acceptance_criteria: String discriminator generates internal string property
Enum discriminator generates internal enum-type property

tasks.title: Implement derived model discriminator
tasks.description: Derived models pass their discriminator literal value to the base constructor. For string discriminators: `base("eagle", wingspan)`. For enum discriminators: `base(DogKind.Golden, weight)`. The derived class public constructor does not expose the discriminator parameter. See the golden files for exact patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Derived constructor chains to base with discriminator literal
Discriminator not exposed as constructor parameter

tasks.title: Implement Unknown discriminator variant
tasks.description: Generate an internal Unknown{BaseName} class for every abstract discriminated base model. It inherits from the base, has an internal constructor that accepts the discriminator (with null-guard for strings, != default guard for structs), and passes it to the base. See UnknownBird.cs in the single-discriminator golden files.
acceptance_criteria: UnknownXxx class generated for each abstract base
Constructor null-guards discriminator with fallback to 'unknown'

tasks.title: Implement derived model additional properties
tasks.description: Derived models may have properties beyond the base model. These should be generated with the same property logic as regular models. The derived constructor includes both base properties and own properties. See Eagle.cs which has Friends, Hate, Partner properties in addition to base Bird properties.
acceptance_criteria: Constructor includes both base and derived params
Base class call includes base params only

tasks.title: Handle multi-level discriminator chains
tasks.description: When an intermediate model in a discriminator hierarchy both has a discriminator value AND has its own discriminated subtypes, generate a dual-constructor pattern. See ModelProvider multi-level discriminator detection logic.
acceptance_criteria: Multi-level discriminators generate correct constructor chains
Intermediate types have both discriminator value and subtypes

tasks.title: Write inheritance tests
tasks.description: Write tests for model inheritance covering: single string discriminator, enum discriminator, unknown variant generation, multi-level discriminators. Compare against golden files.

tasks.title: Create FixedEnumFile component
tasks.description: Generate a C# enum declaration from a non-extensible TCGC InputEnumType. Use @alloy-js/csharp EnumDeclaration and EnumMember. File path: src/Generated/Models/{EnumName}.cs. Each member has XML doc comment. String-backed enums have no initialization values. Int-backed enums have explicit integer values. See golden files at Spector/http/type/enum/fixed/.
acceptance_criteria: Fixed enum generates C# enum with values
Each member has XML doc comment

tasks.title: Handle string-backed fixed enums
tasks.description: String-backed fixed enums require a serialization extension class because C# enums can't hold string values directly. The enum members don't have initialization values. Serialization/deserialization is handled by the extension class (task 1.5).
acceptance_criteria: String-backed enum members have no initialization values

tasks.title: Handle int-backed fixed enums
tasks.description: Int-backed fixed enums have explicit integer initialization values on each member. E.g., `One = 1, Two = 2, Four = 4`. The values come from the InputEnumTypeValue.Value field.
acceptance_criteria: Int-backed enum members have integer initialization values

tasks.title: Handle float-backed fixed enums
tasks.description: Float-backed fixed enums behave like string-backed — no initialization on members since C# enums can't hold float values. Serialization handled by extension class.
acceptance_criteria: Float-backed enum renders correctly without initialization values

tasks.title: Write fixed enum tests
tasks.description: Write tests for string-backed, int-backed, and float-backed fixed enums. Compare against golden files.

tasks.title: Create FixedEnumSerializationFile component
tasks.description: Generate the serialization extension class for fixed enums. File path: src/Generated/Models/{EnumName}.Serialization.cs. The class is `internal static partial class {EnumName}Extensions`. See golden file StringFixedEnum.Serialization.cs.
acceptance_criteria: Serialization file generated with correct path

tasks.title: Implement ToSerialString for string enums
tasks.description: Generate `public static string ToSerialString(this EnumName value)` method with a switch expression mapping each enum member to its wire value string. E.g., `EnumName.One => "1"`. See FixedEnumSerializationProvider.BuildSerializationMethod.
acceptance_criteria: Maps each member to wire value

tasks.title: Implement ToSerial numeric methods
tasks.description: Generate ToSerialSingle or ToSerialInt32 for float/int-backed enums. These use the same switch expression pattern but return numeric values.

tasks.title: Implement deserialization method for fixed enums
tasks.description: Generate `public static EnumName ToEnumName(this string/int/float value)` method. For strings, uses `if (StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase.Equals(value, "wireValue"))` chain. For numerics, uses `if (value == numericValue)` chain. Falls through to `throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException`.

tasks.title: Skip serialization for int-backed enums
tasks.description: Int-backed fixed enums don't need a ToSerialXxx method because (int)enumValue suffices. Only generate the deserialization To{EnumName} method. See FixedEnumSerializationProvider.NeedsSerializationMethod.

tasks.title: Write fixed enum serialization tests
tasks.description: Test serialization extension generation for string, int, and float enums.

tasks.title: Create ExtensibleEnumFile component
tasks.description: Generate a readonly partial struct implementing IEquatable<T> for extensible enums. Use @alloy-js/csharp StructDeclaration with readonly modifier. The struct has a private _value field, private const value fields, static properties, a constructor, equality operators, implicit conversion, Equals, GetHashCode, and ToString. File path: src/Generated/Models/{EnumName}.cs. See golden file DaysOfWeekExtensibleEnum.cs from Spector.
acceptance_criteria: Has _value field, const fields, static properties
Has constructor, equality, implicit conversion, ToString

tasks.title: Implement extensible enum value fields
tasks.description: Generate the private _value field and private const value fields. E.g., `private readonly string _value;` and `private const string MondayValue = "Monday";`. The const field names append 'Value' suffix to the member name.
acceptance_criteria: Const fields generated with Value suffix

tasks.title: Implement extensible enum static properties
tasks.description: Generate static properties that return cached instances. E.g., `public static DaysOfWeek Monday { get; } = new DaysOfWeek(MondayValue);`.
acceptance_criteria: Static properties generated for each enum value

tasks.title: Implement extensible enum constructor
tasks.description: Generate the public constructor: `public EnumName(underlyingType value)`. For string underlying types, add `Argument.AssertNotNull(value, nameof(value))`. Assigns `_value = value`.
acceptance_criteria: Constructor generated with underlying type param

tasks.title: Implement extensible enum equality
tasks.description: Generate: operator ==, operator !=, Equals(object), Equals(T), GetHashCode. String equality uses StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase. Numeric equality uses direct comparison. GetHashCode for strings uses StringComparer.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase. See ExtensibleEnumProvider.BuildMethods.

tasks.title: Implement extensible enum implicit conversion
tasks.description: Generate implicit operator from underlying type: `public static implicit operator EnumName(underlyingType value) => new EnumName(value);`. For string types, also generate nullable variant: `public static implicit operator EnumName?(string value) => value == null ? null : new EnumName(value);`.
acceptance_criteria: Implicit operator from underlying type generated
Nullable string variant generated for string enums

tasks.title: Implement extensible enum ToString
tasks.description: Generate ToString: for strings, return `_value` directly. For numeric types, return `_value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)`.
acceptance_criteria: ToString generated correctly for string and numeric variants

tasks.title: Write extensible enum tests
tasks.description: Write tests for string-backed, int-backed extensible enums. Compare against golden files from Spector.

tasks.title: Create ExtensibleEnumSerializationFile
tasks.description: Generate serialization partial struct for numeric extensible enums. File path: src/Generated/Models/{EnumName}.Serialization.cs. Generates a partial struct with ToSerialInt32/ToSerialSingle method that returns `_value`. String extensible enums don't need a serialization file. See ExtensibleEnumSerializationProvider.
acceptance_criteria: Serialization file generated for numeric extensible enums

tasks.title: Implement ToSerial for numeric extensible enums
tasks.description: Generate `internal int ToSerialInt32() => _value;` or `internal float ToSerialSingle() => _value;` depending on underlying type.
acceptance_criteria: ToSerial method returns _value with correct type

tasks.title: Skip serialization for string extensible enums
tasks.description: String extensible enums use ToString() for serialization and implicit operator for deserialization. No serialization file needed.
acceptance_criteria: String extensible enums produce no serialization file

tasks.title: Write extensible enum serialization tests
tasks.description: Test extensible enum serialization file generation for numeric and string variants.

tasks.title: Create ModelFactoryFile component
tasks.description: Generate the static model factory class: `public static partial class {ServiceName}ModelFactory`. Contains one static method per public model for creating instances (for testing/mocking). File path: src/Generated/{ServiceName}ModelFactory.cs.
acceptance_criteria: Methods match full constructor minus raw data

tasks.title: Implement factory methods
tasks.description: Each factory method takes parameters matching the full serialization constructor minus additionalBinaryDataProperties. Collections default to null-coalesced with `new List<T>()`. Returns `new ModelType(params..., null)` (null for raw data).
acceptance_criteria: Returns new instance with null for raw data

tasks.title: Handle abstract models in factory
tasks.description: Abstract models instantiate the Unknown variant instead. E.g., `public static Bird Bird(...) => new UnknownBird(...)`. See ModelFactoryProvider lines 375-387.

tasks.title: Handle discriminator exclusion in factory
tasks.description: Exclude discriminator parameters from factory methods when the model has a fixed discriminator value. The discriminator is hardcoded in the derived constructor, so it shouldn't be a factory parameter.
acceptance_criteria: Discriminator params excluded when value is fixed

tasks.title: Write model factory tests
tasks.description: Test model factory generation for various model types.
acceptance_criteria: Factory tests pass for simple, abstract, discriminated models

phases.title: JSON Serialization (IJsonModel / IPersistableModel)
phases.description: Generate the .Serialization.cs partial classes implementing JSON serialization and deserialization for all model types.

tasks.title: Create ModelSerializationFile component
tasks.description: Generate the .Serialization.cs partial class that implements IJsonModel<T> and IPersistableModel<T>. The file declares a partial class with the same name as the model, in the same namespace, with the interface implementations. File path: src/Generated/Models/{Name}.Serialization.cs. See any .Serialization.cs golden file.
acceptance_criteria: Serialization file generated with correct path

tasks.title: Implement interface determination
tasks.description: Determine which interfaces the serialization class implements: IJsonModel<T> for JSON-supporting models, IPersistableModel<T> for XML-only models. Most models use IJsonModel (which extends IPersistableModel). Check InputModelTypeUsage flags.

tasks.title: Generate parameterless internal constructor
tasks.description: Generate `internal ModelName() { }` or `internal ModelName() => throw null;` as the deserialization constructor. This is needed for the MRW framework.

tasks.title: Generate PersistableModel write/create methods
tasks.description: Generate PersistableModelWriteCore and PersistableModelCreateCore methods. These dispatch on format string: 'J' → JSON path, 'X' → XML path. WriteCore uses ModelReaderWriter.Write for JSON. CreateCore uses JsonDocument.Parse for JSON. Both are protected virtual (or override for derived models).
acceptance_criteria: Virtual for root, override for derived

tasks.title: Generate explicit interface implementations
tasks.description: Generate the one-liner explicit interface implementations: `BinaryData IPersistableModel<T>.Write(options) => PersistableModelWriteCore(options);`, `T IPersistableModel<T>.Create(data, options) => PersistableModelCreateCore(data, options);`, `string IPersistableModel<T>.GetFormatFromOptions(options) => "J";`.

tasks.title: Write serialization structure tests
tasks.description: Test the serialization file structure (interfaces, constructors, method signatures) without testing method bodies.

tasks.title: Create JsonWriteCore component
tasks.description: Generate the JsonModelWriteCore method body. This is the core serialization method that writes each property to JSON. It's protected virtual for root models, protected override for derived. Starts with format validation, then writes properties, then writes additional data. See MrwSerializationTypeDefinition.cs CreateSerializeHandler.

tasks.title: Implement base class call for derived models
tasks.description: Derived models call base.JsonModelWriteCore(writer, options) before writing their own properties.

tasks.title: Implement primitive property serialization
tasks.description: Generate writer.WritePropertyName("name"u8) + writer.WriteStringValue/WriteNumberValue/WriteBooleanValue for each primitive type. Use UTF-8 string literals for property names.

tasks.title: Implement DateTime serialization with encoding
tasks.description: DateTimeOffset serialization depends on encoding: RFC3339/ISO8601→WriteStringValue(value, "O"), RFC7231/RFC1123→WriteStringValue(value, "R"), Unix→WriteNumberValue(value, "U"). See MrwSerializationTypeDefinition lines 2365-2376.

tasks.title: Implement Duration serialization
tasks.description: TimeSpan serialization: ISO8601→WriteStringValue(value, "P"), Seconds→WriteNumberValue(TotalSeconds), Milliseconds→WriteNumberValue(TotalMilliseconds). Float variants use double TotalSeconds.

tasks.title: Implement bytes serialization
tasks.description: byte[]/BinaryData serialization: Base64→WriteBase64StringValue(value, "D"), Base64URL→WriteBase64StringValue(value, "U").

tasks.title: Implement nested model serialization
tasks.description: Nested model properties use writer.WriteObjectValue(value, options) which delegates to the model's own IJsonModel.Write.

tasks.title: Implement enum serialization
tasks.description: Fixed enums: string-backed→value.ToSerialString(), int-backed→(int)value, float-backed→value.ToSerialSingle(). Extensible enums: string-backed→value.ToString(), numeric→value.ToSerialInt32().

tasks.title: Implement collection serialization
tasks.description: Lists: WriteStartArray → foreach item → serialize item → WriteEndArray. Handle nested collections recursively.

tasks.title: Implement dictionary serialization
tasks.description: Dictionaries: WriteStartObject → foreach KVP → WritePropertyName(key) → serialize value → WriteEndObject.

tasks.title: Implement optional property guards
tasks.description: Optional properties wrapped with `if (Optional.IsDefined(prop))`. Optional collections wrapped with `if (Optional.IsCollectionDefined(prop))`.

tasks.title: Implement required-nullable write pattern
tasks.description: Required nullable properties use IsDefined + WriteNull else branch: `if (Optional.IsDefined(prop)) { write... } else { writer.WriteNull("name"u8); }`.
acceptance_criteria: Required nullable properties write null when not defined

tasks.title: Implement read-only property guards
tasks.description: Read-only properties are only serialized when `options.Format != "W"` (non-wire format).
acceptance_criteria: Read-only properties guarded by format check

tasks.title: Implement additional binary data serialization
tasks.description: Write _additionalBinaryDataProperties at the end of JsonModelWriteCore, only when options.Format != "W". Use #if NET6_0_OR_GREATER guard for WriteRawValue vs JsonDocument.Parse fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Additional data written with format guard

tasks.title: Write JSON write path tests
tasks.description: Test JSON serialization for various property type combinations.

tasks.title: Create JsonDeserialize component
tasks.description: Generate the static DeserializeXxx(JsonElement element, ModelReaderWriterOptions options) method. This is the core deserialization method.

tasks.title: Implement null check
tasks.description: First line: `if (element.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Null) { return null; }`.

tasks.title: Implement variable declarations
tasks.description: Declare local variables for all serialization constructor parameters. E.g., `string name = default;`, `IList<int> items = default;`, `IDictionary<string, BinaryData> additionalBinaryDataProperties = new ChangeTrackingDictionary<string, BinaryData>();`.
acceptance_criteria: All constructor params declared as locals with defaults

tasks.title: Implement property matching loop
tasks.description: Generate `foreach (var prop in element.EnumerateObject())` with `if (prop.NameEquals("name"u8))` for each property, followed by value extraction and `continue`.

tasks.title: Implement primitive deserialization
tasks.description: Map each primitive type to its JsonElement getter: string→GetString(), int→GetInt32(), bool→GetBoolean(), etc.

tasks.title: Implement encoded type deserialization
tasks.description: DateTime: Unix→FromUnixTimeSeconds(GetInt64()), others→GetDateTimeOffset(format). Duration: Seconds→FromSeconds(GetInt32/GetDouble()), ISO8601→GetTimeSpan("P"). Bytes: Base64→GetBytesFromBase64(), Base64URL→custom.

tasks.title: Implement model deserialization
tasks.description: Nested models: `ModelName.DeserializeModelName(prop.Value, options)`.
acceptance_criteria: Nested model deserialization calls correct static method

tasks.title: Implement enum deserialization
tasks.description: Fixed enums: use the To{EnumName} extension method. Extensible enums: use `new ExtensibleEnum(element.GetString())` or implicit conversion.
acceptance_criteria: Fixed and extensible enum deserialization correct

tasks.title: Implement collection deserialization
tasks.description: Lists: declare `List<T>`, foreach item in element.EnumerateArray(), deserialize, add to list.

tasks.title: Implement dictionary deserialization
tasks.description: Dictionaries: declare `Dictionary<string,T>`, foreach prop in element.EnumerateObject(), deserialize value, add.

tasks.title: Implement null value handling
tasks.description: Handle JsonValueKind.Null for each property variant: nullable→assign null, required nullable collection→new empty list, optional→continue.
acceptance_criteria: Null handling correct per property variant

tasks.title: Implement additional binary data capture
tasks.description: Unknown properties in the foreach loop go to additionalBinaryDataProperties: `additionalBinaryDataProperties.Add(prop.Name, BinaryData.FromString(prop.Value.GetRawText()))`. Only when options.Format != "W".
acceptance_criteria: Unknown properties captured with format guard

tasks.title: Implement constructor call
tasks.description: After the loop, return new ModelName(allParams) calling the internal serialization constructor.
acceptance_criteria: Constructor called with all deserialized values

tasks.title: Write JSON read path tests
tasks.description: Test JSON deserialization for various property types.

tasks.title: Implement discriminator peek
tasks.description: In DeserializeXxx for abstract base models: peek at discriminator property via element.TryGetProperty("kind"u8, out discriminator), then discriminator.GetString().

tasks.title: Implement discriminator dispatch switch
tasks.description: Switch on discriminator value, dispatching to the correct derived DeserializeXxx method.
acceptance_criteria: Switch dispatches to correct derived deserializer

tasks.title: Implement Unknown fallback
tasks.description: Default case dispatches to UnknownXxx.DeserializeUnknownXxx for unrecognized discriminator values.

tasks.title: Add PersistableModelProxy attribute
tasks.description: Add [PersistableModelProxy(typeof(UnknownXxx))] attribute on abstract base model serialization class.
acceptance_criteria: Attribute added on abstract base serialization classes

tasks.title: Write discriminated deserialization tests
tasks.description: Test discriminator dispatch for string and enum discriminators.

tasks.title: Implement implicit BinaryContent operator
tasks.description: Generate `public static implicit operator BinaryContent(T model)` on input model serialization classes. Returns null if model is null, otherwise BinaryContent.Create(model, WireOptions).
acceptance_criteria: Implicit operator generated for input models

tasks.title: Implement explicit ClientResult operator
tasks.description: Generate `public static explicit operator T(ClientResult result)` on output model serialization classes. Parses response content as JSON and deserializes.
acceptance_criteria: Explicit operator generated for output models

tasks.title: Handle dual-format operators
tasks.description: Models supporting both JSON and XML need Content-Type sniffing in the explicit operator.

tasks.title: Write cast operator tests
tasks.description: Test cast operators for input, output, and dual-format models.

tasks.title: Implement IJsonModel.Write wrapper
tasks.description: Generate `void IJsonModel<T>.Write(Utf8JsonWriter writer, ModelReaderWriterOptions options)` that calls WriteStartObject → JsonModelWriteCore → WriteEndObject.

tasks.title: Implement JsonModelCreateCore
tasks.description: Generate JsonModelCreateCore that validates format, parses JsonDocument from reader, calls DeserializeXxx.
acceptance_criteria: CreateCore validates format and calls Deserialize

tasks.title: Write IJsonModel wrapper tests
tasks.description: Test the IJsonModel Write and Create wrapper methods.

phases.title: Client Generation
phases.description: Generate client classes, REST clients, protocol methods, and convenience methods.

tasks.title: Create ClientOptionsFile component
tasks.description: Generate {Name}Options : ClientPipelineOptions with nested ServiceVersion enum and version→string constructor. See golden file SampleTypeSpecClientOptions.cs.
acceptance_criteria: Options class with ServiceVersion enum generated

tasks.title: Implement ServiceVersion enum generation
tasks.description: Generate nested ServiceVersion enum with monotonic ordinals from API version strings. See ApiVersionEnumProvider.
acceptance_criteria: Enum members have sequential integer values
Member names derived from version strings

tasks.title: Implement version→string mapping
tasks.description: Generate constructor with switch expression mapping each ServiceVersion member to its string value.

tasks.title: Write client options tests
tasks.description: Test client options generation for single and multi-version services.

tasks.title: Create ClientFile component
tasks.description: Generate the main client partial class with fields, constructors, Pipeline property, and operation methods. See golden file SampleTypeSpecClient.cs for complete structure.
acceptance_criteria: Client class generated with correct structure

tasks.title: Implement client fields
tasks.description: Generate client fields: _endpoint (Uri), auth credential fields, _apiVersion, sub-client cache fields. See ClientProvider.BuildFields.

tasks.title: Implement client constructors
tasks.description: Generate 3 constructors: mocking (protected parameterless), primary (endpoint+credential+options with pipeline creation), secondary (convenience with defaults). See ClientProvider.BuildConstructors.

tasks.title: Implement sub-client factory methods
tasks.description: Generate thread-safe lazy sub-client accessors using Volatile.Read + Interlocked.CompareExchange pattern. See ClientProvider lines 844-927.

tasks.title: Write client class tests
tasks.description: Test client generation for simple and multi-client scenarios.

tasks.title: Create RestClientFile component
tasks.description: Generate {Name}.RestClient.cs partial class with PipelineMessageClassifier fields and Create{Op}Request methods. See golden file SampleTypeSpecClient.RestClient.cs.

tasks.title: Implement request building
tasks.description: Generate Create{Op}Request method body: ClientUriBuilder construction, path/query parameters, Pipeline.CreateMessage, header setting, content setting, message.Apply. See RestClientProvider.BuildMessage.

tasks.title: Implement parameter serialization variants
tasks.description: Handle all parameter placement variants: required/optional query, path (with URL encoding), headers (with collection format), collection parameters (CSV/SSV/pipes/multi).

tasks.title: Write REST client tests
tasks.description: Test request building for various parameter combinations.
acceptance_criteria: Tests pass for all parameter variants

tasks.title: Create ProtocolMethod component
tasks.description: Generate protocol-level client methods: sync and async pairs that call Create{Op}Request → Pipeline.ProcessMessage → return ClientResult.FromResponse. Include full XML docs with [Protocol Method] tag. See ScmMethodProviderCollection.BuildProtocolMethod.

tasks.title: Write protocol method tests
tasks.description: Test protocol method generation.

tasks.title: Create ConvenienceMethod component
tasks.description: Generate convenience-level client methods: sync and async pairs with typed parameters and return types. Delegates to protocol method. Handles body serialization, response deserialization, CancellationToken→RequestOptions conversion. See ScmMethodProviderCollection.BuildConvenienceMethod.

tasks.title: Implement spread parameter handling
tasks.description: Spread parameters flatten model properties into individual method parameters. The convenience method reconstructs the model from individual params before passing to protocol method.
acceptance_criteria: Spread params flattened in convenience method

tasks.title: Write convenience method tests
tasks.description: Test convenience method generation for various return types and parameter patterns.

tasks.title: Implement operation name conventions
tasks.description: Apply C# naming conventions: List→GetAll, ListXxx→GetXxx, add Async suffix for async methods.

phases.title: Paging and Long-Running Operations
phases.description: Generate paging collection classes and LRO support.

tasks.title: Create CollectionResultFile component
tasks.description: Generate per-operation paging collection classes (4 per operation: sync/async × protocol/convenience). Each extends CollectionResult/AsyncCollectionResult. Stores client, options, and paging parameters. Implements GetRawPages with yield-return loop. See golden files in TestProjects/Local/Sample-TypeSpec/src/Generated/CollectionResults/.
acceptance_criteria: 4 collection result classes per paging operation

tasks.title: Implement next-link paging strategy
tasks.description: For next-link pagination: extract URI from response body, call CreateNext{Op}Request, null-check for termination. See CollectionResultDefinition.BuildGetRawPagesForNextLink.

tasks.title: Implement continuation-token paging strategy
tasks.description: For continuation-token pagination: extract token from response body or header, reuse same Create{Op}Request with updated token, IsNullOrEmpty check for termination.
acceptance_criteria: Token extraction from body and header variants
Same request factory reused with new token

tasks.title: Implement paging client methods
tasks.description: Generate paging-specific client methods returning CollectionResult/AsyncCollectionResult types. Method body instantiates the collection result class.
acceptance_criteria: Paging methods return correct collection types
Method body creates collection result instance

tasks.title: Write paging tests
tasks.description: Test paging generation for next-link and continuation-token strategies.
acceptance_criteria: Paging tests pass for both strategies

tasks.title: Implement LRO method signatures and return types
tasks.description: Generate long-running operation method signatures. Analyze LRO patterns needed from TCGC SdkServiceMethod where kind is 'lro' or 'lropaging'. Generate appropriate return types and polling patterns. See the legacy generator's LRO handling in ScmMethodProviderCollection.
acceptance_criteria: LRO method signatures generated for operations with kind 'lro'
Appropriate return types used for LRO operations
Sync and async method pairs generated

tasks.title: Implement LRO+paging combination
tasks.description: Handle operations that combine long-running operations with paging (kind 'lropaging'). Generate methods that return pageable results after an LRO completes.
acceptance_criteria: Return types combine LRO and collection result patterns

tasks.title: Write LRO tests
tasks.description: Write tests for LRO method generation: basic LRO polling, final-state-via patterns, and LRO+paging combination.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover basic LRO method generation

phases.title: Infrastructure Helpers
phases.description: Generate the ~15 internal infrastructure files that support the client library.

tasks.title: Generate Argument.cs
tasks.description: Generate the internal static Argument class with AssertNotNull, AssertNotNullOrEmpty, AssertNotNullOrWhiteSpace, AssertInRange, CheckNotNullOrEmpty methods. This is a nearly-static file. Use the golden file directly as the template. File path: src/Generated/Internal/Argument.cs.

tasks.title: Generate Optional.cs
tasks.description: Generate internal static Optional class with IsDefined and IsCollectionDefined methods. Includes JsonElement IsDefined variant.

tasks.title: Generate ChangeTrackingList.cs
tasks.description: Generate internal ChangeTrackingList<T> : IList<T>, IReadOnlyList<T> with lazy initialization and IsUndefined semantics.

tasks.title: Generate ChangeTrackingDictionary.cs
tasks.description: Generate internal ChangeTrackingDictionary<TKey,TValue> with lazy initialization and IsUndefined semantics.

tasks.title: Generate remaining infrastructure files
tasks.description: Generate: ErrorResult.cs, ClientPipelineExtensions.cs, CancellationTokenExtensions.cs, PipelineRequestHeadersExtensions.cs, SerializationFormat.cs, TypeFormatters.cs, ClientUriBuilder.cs, Utf8JsonBinaryContent.cs, BinaryContentHelper.cs, ModelSerializationExtensions.cs. These are all mostly-static files. Use golden files as templates.

tasks.title: Generate CodeGen attribute files
tasks.description: Generate CodeGenTypeAttribute.cs, CodeGenMemberAttribute.cs, CodeGenSuppressAttribute.cs, CodeGenSerializationAttribute.cs. These are small, fixed-content files.

tasks.title: Generate ModelReaderWriterContext
tasks.description: Generate {Namespace}Context : ModelReaderWriterContext with [ModelReaderWriterBuildable(typeof(T))] attributes for each serializable model. See golden file _TypeModelUsageContext.cs from Spector.
acceptance_criteria: Buildable attributes for all serializable models

tasks.title: Write infrastructure tests
tasks.description: Verify all infrastructure files generate correctly by comparing against golden files.

tasks.title: Implement custom code awareness
tasks.description: Implement the ability to detect user-written partial classes and filter conflicting generated members. The legacy generator uses Roslyn to analyze custom code; the rewrite needs an alternative strategy (e.g., reading existing .cs files via TypeScript-based parsing or tree-sitter). When a user has written a partial class with a member matching a generated member, the emitter should skip generating that member. This integrates with CodeGenType, CodeGenMember, CodeGenSuppress, and CodeGenSerialization attributes.
acceptance_criteria: Emitter reads existing .cs files in output directory
Detects partial class declarations and their members
Skips generating members that conflict with custom code
CodeGenSuppress attribute suppresses specified generated members

tasks.title: Implement unreferenced type handling
tasks.description: Implement the unreferenced-types-handling emitter option logic. When set to 'removeOrInternalize', types not referenced by any client operation should be removed or internalized. When set to 'internalize', unreferenced types get internal access. When set to 'keepAll', all types are emitted. This requires building a reference graph from client operations to types and walking it to determine reachability. The legacy generator uses Roslyn's SymbolFinder for BFS traversal from root types.
acceptance_criteria: removeOrInternalize: unreferenced types removed or made internal
keepAll: all types emitted regardless of references
Reference graph correctly traverses model→model and client→model edges

phases.title: XML Serialization (Conditional)
phases.description: Generate XML serialization support for models with XML usage.

tasks.title: Implement XML write path
tasks.description: Generate WriteXml and XmlModelWriteCore methods for XML-supporting models. Handle attributes vs elements, namespaces, wrapped/unwrapped collections. See MrwSerializationTypeDefinition.Xml.cs and golden files at Spector/http/payload/xml/.

tasks.title: Implement XML read path
tasks.description: Generate DeserializeXxx(XElement, options) using LINQ to XML. Separate loops for attributes and elements.

tasks.title: Implement dual format support
tasks.description: Handle models with both JSON and XML: format dispatch, Content-Type sniffing, ToBinaryContent(format).

tasks.title: Write XML serialization tests
tasks.description: Test XML serialization against golden files.

phases.title: JSON Merge Patch / Dynamic Models (Conditional)
phases.description: Generate JsonPatch-aware models for merge-patch scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement dynamic model structure
tasks.description: Detect JsonMergePatch usage flag. Generate _patch field, Patch ref-return property with experimental/JsonIgnore attributes. Modify internal constructor to accept JsonPatch. See ScmModelProvider and golden files at Spector/http/payload/json-merge-patch/.
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic model has _patch field and Patch property

tasks.title: Implement patch-aware serialization
tasks.description: Generate serialization with Patch.Contains/IsRemoved checks per property, collection-level removal support, Patch.WriteTo flush. See MrwSerializationTypeDefinition.Dynamic.cs.

tasks.title: Implement patch propagators
tasks.description: Generate SetPropagators + PropagateGet/PropagateSet for nested dynamic models. Handle list/dictionary/deeply-nested navigation.
acceptance_criteria: Propagators generated for nested dynamic models

tasks.title: Write merge-patch tests
tasks.description: Test dynamic model generation against golden files.

phases.title: Project Scaffolding
phases.description: Generate .csproj and .sln files for new projects.

tasks.title: Implement project file generation
tasks.description: Generate .csproj using Alloy CsprojFile component. Include netstandard2.0;net8.0 targets, System.ClientModel dependency, package metadata. See NewProjectScaffolding in the legacy generator.

tasks.title: Implement .sln generation
tasks.description: Generate Visual Studio .sln file referencing the project.

phases.title: Multipart Form Data (Conditional)
phases.description: Generate multipart content handling for file upload operations.

tasks.title: Generate MultiPartFormDataBinaryContent
tasks.description: Conditionally generate MultiPartFormDataBinaryContent.cs when multipart operations exist. See golden file and MultiPartFormDataBinaryContentDefinition.

tasks.title: Implement multipart request building
tasks.description: Generate request building for multipart operations: create MultiPartFormDataBinaryContent, pass content.ContentType.

tasks.title: Write multipart tests
tasks.description: Test multipart generation.

phases.title: Integration Testing and Validation
phases.description: End-to-end validation against legacy generator golden files.

tasks.title: Validate authentication scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector authentication golden files: api-key, oauth2, union, noauth, custom.
acceptance_criteria: Output matches all authentication golden files

tasks.title: Validate model scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector type/model golden files: usage, inheritance, enum-discriminator, single-discriminator.
acceptance_criteria: Output matches all model golden files

tasks.title: Validate enum scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector type/enum golden files: fixed, extensible.
acceptance_criteria: Output matches all enum golden files

tasks.title: Validate parameter scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector parameter golden files: basic, spread, collection-format, body-optionality.
acceptance_criteria: Output matches all parameter golden files

tasks.title: Validate encoding scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector encode golden files: datetime, duration, bytes.
acceptance_criteria: Output matches all encoding golden files

tasks.title: Validate paging scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector payload/pageable golden files.

tasks.title: Validate versioning scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector versioning golden files: added, removed.

tasks.title: Validate full Local/Sample-TypeSpec output
tasks.description: End-to-end validation against the complete Local/Sample-TypeSpec golden output including all clients, models, infrastructure, and collection results.
acceptance_criteria: All generated files match golden output

tasks.title: Validate server and endpoint scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector server/endpoint golden files. Verify correct endpoint parameter handling, multi-server support, and URL template resolution.
acceptance_criteria: Generated output matches Spector server/endpoint golden files

tasks.title: Validate content-negotiation and media-type scenarios
tasks.description: Compare output against Spector payload/content-negotiation and payload/media-type golden files. Verify correct Accept header handling and response content type processing.

Generated output matches Spector media-type golden files
